'''Corvis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].

==Biography==
He was a member of [[Talon Karrde]]'s organization during the [[Thrawn campaign]], serving as a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] on Karrde's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] and mobile base of operations, the ''[[Wild Karrde]]''. During [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], Corvis worked the comm station onboard the ''[[Starry Ice]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
His name is misspelled as "Corvus" in ''[[Specter of the Past]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}
